name: AI Interview Questions Generator
description: Generate tailored, role-specific interview questions instantly.
pageTitle: Free AI Interview Questions Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Prepare for any interview by generating targeted, role-specific questions for candidates or for your own practice.
placeholder: e.g., Senior React Developer with 5 years experience
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Technical Recruiter and Hiring Manager. Generate 10 highly relevant, challenging, and insightful interview questions for the following role: "${input}". Include a mix of technical, behavioral, and situational questions. Format as a markdown list.

name: AI SQL Query Generator
description: Translate plain English text into complex SQL queries.
pageTitle: Free AI SQL Query Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Generate optimized SQL queries from plain English descriptions instantly.
placeholder: e.g., Get all users who signed up last month and ordered more than 3 items
systemPrompt: Act as a Senior Database Administrator. Generate a highly optimized SQL query based on this request: "${input}". Provide ONLY the SQL code in a markdown block, followed by a brief 1-sentence explanation.

name: AI Slogan Generator
description: Create catchy and memorable slogans for your brand or campaign.
pageTitle: Free AI Slogan Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Instantly brainstorm catchy, memorable, and high-converting slogans for your business, brand, or marketing campaign.
placeholder: e.g., An eco-friendly coffee brand that sources fair-trade beans
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Copywriter. Generate 10 catchy, creative, and memorable slogans for the following brand/product: "${input}". Keep them punchy and impactful. Format as a markdown bulleted list.

name: AI Elevator Pitch Generator
description: Craft persuasive elevator pitches based on your role or product.
pageTitle: Free AI Elevator Pitch Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Craft a compelling and persuasive 30-second elevator pitch for yourself or your business instantly.
inputLabel: Who are you / What is your business?
placeholder: e.g., I am a freelance web developer helping local restaurants get online.
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Career Coach and Sales Strategist. Write 3 compelling, persuasive, and concise elevator pitches (under 60 seconds spoken) based on this information: "${input}". Format in markdown with bold headings.

name: AI Video Script Generator
description: Write engaging scripts for YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram Reels.
pageTitle: Free AI Video Script Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Write highly engaging, viral-worthy scripts for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram Reels in seconds.
placeholder: e.g., A 60-second TikTok about the top 3 hidden iPhone features
systemPrompt: Act as a Viral Content Creator and Scriptwriter. Write a highly engaging, fast-paced video script about "${input}". Include visual cues (e.g., [Camera zooms in]) and a strong hook in the first 3 seconds. Format in markdown.

name: AI Job Description Generator
description: Create comprehensive and professional job descriptions for hiring.
pageTitle: Free AI Job Description Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Generate professional, comprehensive, and attractive job descriptions to attract top talent.
placeholder: e.g., Marketing Manager, 3+ years experience, remote, focus on SEO and social media
systemPrompt: Act as an expert HR Manager. Write a comprehensive, professional, and attractive job description for: "${input}". Include sections for About the Role, Key Responsibilities, Requirements, and Benefits. Format beautifully in markdown.

name: AI Instagram Hashtag Generator
description: Generate viral, relevant hashtags for your social media posts.
pageTitle: Free AI Instagram Hashtag Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Boost your reach and engagement with AI-generated, highly relevant hashtags for Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter.
placeholder: e.g., A photo of a sunset at the beach in Malibu
systemPrompt: Act as a Social Media Marketing Expert. Generate 30 highly relevant, trending, and optimized hashtags for a post about: "${input}". Group them into Broad, Niche, and Location/Specific categories. Format in markdown.

name: AI Story Generator
description: Write creative short stories based on a prompt and genre.
pageTitle: Free AI Story Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Unleash your creativity. Generate engaging, unique short stories based on any prompt or genre.
placeholder: e.g., A sci-fi story about a detective who can read memories
systemPrompt: Act as a Bestselling Novelist. Write a captivating, creative, and well-structured short story based on this prompt: "${input}". Focus on showing, not telling, and include strong character dialogue. Format in markdown.

name: AI Travel Itinerary Planner
description: Create detailed daily travel plans for any destination.
pageTitle: Free AI Travel Itinerary Planner | QuickTools
pageDescription: Plan your perfect trip instantly. Generate day-by-day travel itineraries customized to your destination and duration.
placeholder: e.g., 3 days in Tokyo focusing on food and culture
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Travel Agent. Create a detailed, day-by-day travel itinerary for "${input}". Include morning, afternoon, and evening activities, plus local food recommendations. Format nicely in markdown.

name: AI Meal Planner
description: Generate weekly meal plans with specific dietary constraints.
pageTitle: Free AI Meal Planner | QuickTools
pageDescription: Generate healthy, customized weekly meal plans based on your dietary preferences and goals.
placeholder: e.g., Vegetarian, high protein, 2000 calories a day
systemPrompt: Act as a certified Nutritionist. Create a 7-day meal plan based on these requirements: "${input}". Include Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, and Snacks for each day. Format as a clean markdown table or structured list.

name: AI Poem Generator
description: Generate beautiful poems in various styles and formats.
pageTitle: Free AI Poem Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Compose beautiful, rhyming, or free-verse poetry instantly based on your chosen topic and emotion.
placeholder: e.g., A romantic poem about the rain in a classic sonnet style
systemPrompt: Act as a Master Poet. Write a beautiful, evocative, and creative poem based on this topic and style: "${input}". Use strong imagery and emotional resonance. Format in markdown.

name: AI Review Responder
description: Generate professional replies to customer reviews or feedback.
pageTitle: Free AI Review Responder | QuickTools
pageDescription: Save time and maintain a great reputation by generating professional, empathetic replies to customer reviews.
placeholder: e.g., 2 stars. The food was cold when it arrived and the delivery took 2 hours.
systemPrompt: Act as a Professional Customer Success Manager. Write a polite, empathetic, and professional response to the following customer review: "${input}". If it is a negative review, de-escalate and offer a solution. Format in markdown.

name: AI Event Planner
description: Generate a step-by-step plan and schedule for any event or party.
pageTitle: Free AI Event Planner | QuickTools
pageDescription: Plan your events effortlessly. Get a comprehensive checklist, timeline, and ideas for your next party or corporate event.
placeholder: e.g., A surprise 30th birthday party for 50 people on a budget
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Event Coordinator. Create a comprehensive event plan and checklist for: "${input}". Include a timeline (months/weeks before), budget tips, and day-of schedule. Format cleanly in markdown.

name: AI YouTube Tags Generator
description: Generate optimized SEO tags and keywords for a YouTube video.
pageTitle: Free AI YouTube Tags Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Boost your video views and SEO ranking with AI-generated, highly optimized tags for YouTube.
placeholder: e.g., How to bake the perfect chocolate chip cookies
systemPrompt: Act as a YouTube SEO Expert. Generate a comma-separated list of 30 highly optimized, high-volume search tags/keywords for a video about: "${input}". Put them in a code block so they are easy to copy.

name: AI Apology Letter Generator
description: Write sincere, professional, or personal apology letters.
pageTitle: Free AI Apology Letter Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Draft sincere, well-worded, and appropriate apology letters for professional or personal situations instantly.
placeholder: e.g., I missed an important client meeting because I overslept
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Communicator. Write a sincere, professional, and well-structured apology letter based on this situation: "${input}". Do not make overly defensive excuses. Format in markdown.

name: AI Dream Interpreter
description: Analyzes your dreams and provides interesting psychological interpretations.
pageTitle: Free AI Dream Interpreter | QuickTools
pageDescription: Discover the hidden meaning behind your dreams with our AI-powered psychological and symbolic dream interpreter.
placeholder: e.g., I was falling from a tall building but I was holding a giant umbrella
systemPrompt: Act as an expert Psychologist and Dream Analyst (like Carl Jung). Provide a fascinating, symbolic, and psychological interpretation of this dream: "${input}". Format in markdown with bold headings.

name: AI Git Command Generator
description: Generates exact git commands based on plain English descriptions.
pageTitle: Free AI Git Command Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Forget complex git syntax. Describe what you want to do in plain English, and get the exact git commands instantly.
inputLabel: What do you want to do?
placeholder: e.g., Undo my last commit but keep the files staged
systemPrompt: Act as a Senior DevOps Engineer. Provide the exact Git terminal command(s) needed to accomplish this: "${input}". Put the commands in a bash markdown block, followed by a very brief explanation.

name: AI Real Estate Listing Generator
description: Creates engaging property descriptions for real estate agents.
pageTitle: Free AI Real Estate Listing Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Write captivating, conversion-optimized property descriptions that sell homes faster.
placeholder: e.g., 3 bed, 2 bath house in Austin, newly renovated kitchen, large backyard
systemPrompt: Act as a top-tier Real Estate Copywriter. Write an engaging, highly attractive property listing description based on these details: "${input}". Highlight the best features. Format in markdown.

name: AI Resignation Letter Generator
description: Generates professional resignation letters tailored to your situation.
pageTitle: Free AI Resignation Letter Generator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Leave on good terms. Generate a polite, professional, and appropriately toned resignation letter instantly.
placeholder: e.g., Leaving my job as a Graphic Designer in 2 weeks to pursue a new opportunity
systemPrompt: Act as an expert HR Professional. Write a polite, professional, and standard resignation letter based on these details: "${input}". Ensure it leaves a positive final impression. Format in markdown.

name: AI Emoji Translator
description: Translates plain English text into creative emoji sequences.
pageTitle: Free AI Emoji Translator | QuickTools
pageDescription: Turn any text, quote, or sentence into a fun sequence of emojis instantly.
placeholder: e.g., I am going to the beach tomorrow to surf and drink coconut water
systemPrompt: Act as an expert in internet culture and emojis. Translate the following text purely into a creative, expressive sequence of emojis that tells the story visually: "${input}". Provide ONLY the emojis, no text.
